allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Update Fluxbox menu Chrome command to enable VSync

- Change --disable-gpu-vsync to --enable-gpu-vsync
- Add --disable-frame-rate-limit and --enable-zero-copy
- Fix ublock-origin to ublock-lite for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Correct uBlock extension path from ublock-lite to ublock-origin

Critical fix: Dockerfile installs uBlock Origin \(Full MV2\) to /opt/extensions/ublock-origin,
but chrome.desktop and Fluxbox menu were referencing non-existent ublock-lite path.
This caused Chrome to fail loading the extension.

Changes:
- chrome.desktop: Fix extension path to match installed location
- entrypoint.sh Fluxbox menu: Fix extension path to match installed location
- entrypoint.sh main startup: Already correct \(ublock-origin\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
